news.headline: Chimera Investment Corporation acquires Palisades Group, a real estate credit specialist. Deal completed on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: In New York, Chimera Investment Corporation (NYSE: CIM) revealed its successful acquisition of Palisades Group, a U.S.-based alternative asset manager focused on residential real estate credit, established in 2012. The transaction was finalized on December 2, 2024. Jack Macdowell, Jr., the co-founder and Chief Investment Officer of Palisades, assumed the role of Chief Investment Officer at Chimera as part of the agreement.

news.headline: LumenHaus presents innovative smart home energy solutions at Solar Solutions Düsseldorf 2024. Leading in decentralized energy.
news.summary: In Dusseldorf, Germany on December 3, 2024, LumenHaus, a cutting-edge platform leading the way in the energy transition with a focus on decentralized, community-oriented, and eco-friendly energy solutions, revealed its latest progress in intelligent home energy control at Solar Solutions.

news.headline: Discovering worth in Nvidia and the other top tech companies.
CLICK expanding service to CCSV scheme in Hong Kong; collaborating with Care U; first private company to be licensed.
news.summary: CLICK has made a significant collaboration with Care U Professional Nursing Service Limited to offer integrated Home-based services for the elderly in Hong Kong. This partnership marks a milestone as CLICK is the first private company outside of NGOs to secure a license as a recognized service provider under the CCSV scheme. The initiative aims to improve the quality of care provided to the elderly population. This collaboration will impact a substantial number of the elderly population in Hong Kong who are eligible for the scheme.

news.headline: Premier, Inc. appoints David Zito as President, Performance Services on Dec 6, 2024, overseeing growth of company's technology and consulting businesses.
news.summary: Premier, Inc. (NASDAQ: PINC), a prominent healthcare improvement company, has appointed David Zito as President, Performance Services, starting December 6, 2024. In his new role, Zito will be responsible for leading Premier's Performance Services division, which includes advancing the enterprise-wide AI-driven technology ventures and the consulting practice. Reporting to Michael J. Alkire, Premier's President, Zito's main focus will be on expanding and enhancing the company's offerings in this sector.

news.headline: Global Surface Scanners Market projected to reach US$ 9,339.1 million with 9.5% CAGR by 2034, creating opportunity of US$ 1,132.9 million from 2019 to 2023. North America holds 24.3% market share in 2034. Key players: Shining 3D, FARO Technologies, Inc. Optical scanners expected to grow at 9.7% CAGR, generating US$ 1,201.6 million opportunity between 2024-2034.
news.summary: The global Surface Scanners Market is expected to reach US$ 3,768.4 million in 2024 and grow at a CAGR of 9.5% from 2024 to 2034. The increasing demand for precision measurement instruments and automation across industries like manufacturing, aerospace, automotive, electronics, and healthcare is driving this growth. Optical surface scanners are predicted to grow at a CAGR of 9.7%, with North America and East Asia collectively creating an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 2,681.9 million. Leading market players include Shining 3D and FARO Technologies, Inc. as key innovators driving advancements in the industry. Industries are leveraging surface scanners for accurate measurements, quality assurance, and competitiveness. Key players include 3D Systems Corporation, Creaform, Inc., and others. North America is expected to hold a market share of 24.3% in 2034.

news.headline: Matador Resources increases borrowing base to $3.25 billion, with $2.25 billion commitments.
news.summary: Matador Resources Company (NYSE: MTDR) disclosed a significant update, revealing that its lenders have augmented the borrowing base within its credit agreement by 30%, elevating it from $2.50 billion to $3.25 billion. This boost originated from the routine semi-annual borrowing base reassessment. Despite this uplift, Matador has chosen to maintain its borrowing commitments at $2.25 billion for now. However, the company acknowledges the possibility of expanding its borrowings in the future.

news.headline: Appian honors top partners at Appian Europe 2024. Winners deliver business impact; Nasdaq: APPN.
news.summary: Appian (Nasdaq: APPN) has recently recognized the achievements of its partners at Appian Europe by presenting them with the annual Partner Awards on December 3, 2024, in London. The winning partners demonstrated the ability to deliver substantial business impact through process orchestration. These top partners have effectively implemented solutions that have made a significant difference in the industry.

news.headline: Arizona Sonoran Receives Amended Industrial Air Permit from Pinal County with 87% local support for Cactus Project.
news.summary: In Casa Grande, Arizona, ASCU has recently disclosed an update regarding the Industrial Air Permit, received from the Pinal County Air Quality Division in Toronto. This amendment marks a significant milestone for ASCU, indicating progress in compliance with environmental regulations. The new permit outlines revised guidelines for air quality standards, reflecting the company's commitment to sustainability. The approval signifies ASCU's dedication to maintaining environmentally-friendly operations, with the permit incorporating stricter emissions controls. This milestone showcases ASCU's ongoing efforts to align with regulatory requirements, ensuring minimal environmental impact in their industrial processes in Casa Grande, Arizona.

news.headline: AI revolution shaping construction trends: PCL Construction executive forecasts overhaul in electrical grid and water infrastructure.
news.summary: The head of PCL Construction in the United States reveals significant trends in artificial intelligence impacting the construction industry. In a recent press release dated December 3, 2024, it was disclosed that the AI revolution is underway, leading to a major overhaul of the country's electrical grid and water infrastructure.

news.headline: Zettabyte partners with Pegatron to revolutionize AI data centers, marking a significant strategic move in the tech industry.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Taipei, Zettabyte, a prominent AI data center software developer, revealed a major strategic collaboration with Pegatron Corporation, a renowned Electronics and Manufacturing Service (EMS+) provider. This partnership signifies a crucial move for both companies in the technological sector.

news.headline: Karen S. Carter appointed as COO of Dow, effective immediately. Former president of Dow Packaging & Specialty Plastics.
news.summary: Midland, Michigan – On December 3, 2024, Dow revealed the promotion of Karen S. Carter, the current president of Dow Packaging & Specialty Plastics, to the position of Chief Operating Officer. This change is effective immediately. As the new COO, Carter will play a pivotal role in steering the company's operations and advancing its business strategies. Dow, listed as DOW on the NYSE, is making this significant organizational shift to leverage Carter's expertise and leadership skills in enhancing company performance.

news.headline: Invesco Advisers terminates Invesco High Income 2024 Target Term Fund (IHTA). Fund liquidated as planned.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Invesco Advisers, Inc., a subsidiary of Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), revealed the successful termination and liquidation of the Invesco High Income 2024 Target Term Fund (NYSE: IHTA). The Fund was officially closed as part of its investment objectives.

news.headline: Simplilearn named a top IT and technical training provider in 2024 by Training Industry, based in Plano, Texas.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas on December 3, 2024, Simplilearn, a renowned global digital upskilling leader, was acknowledged in the 2024 Top IT and Technical Training Companies List by Training Industry. This recognition highlights Simplilearn's dedication to providing high-quality training in the technological field.

news.headline: Caris Life Sciences will present research from seven studies on breast cancer at 2024 San Antonio Symposium.
news.summary: Caris Life Sciences (Caris) will unveil research findings from seven studies involving various types of breast cancer, including male breast cancer. These studies, conducted in partnership with top cancer centers, showcase Caris' effectiveness in precision medicine. The results are set to be presented on December 3, 2024, in Irving, Texas.

news.headline: Update on share capital & voting rights for November 2024: total shares issued 50 million, voting rights attached to 60 million.
Salesforce's record jump driven by AI faces reality check.
Antietam Broadband introduces Flight Mobile for customers.
Wipro partners with Netskope to provide cybersecurity advisory services, enhancing automated regulatory compliance.
news.summary: Wipro Limited has recently entered into a collaboration with Netskope, a notable cybersecurity firm, to provide Cybersecurity Optimization Advisory Services. This partnership aims to enhance cybersecurity measures for businesses and organizations. Wipro Limited, based in Bengaluru, India, specializes in IT, consulting, and business process services. The collaboration with Netskope, based in East Brunswick, N.J., signifies a strategic move to offer advanced cybersecurity solutions to clients. This partnership emphasizes the growing importance of cybersecurity in today's digital landscape.

news.headline: Manipal Hospitals in Kolkata performs Eastern India's 1st AI-powered wireless pacemaker insertion by Abbott, a milestone in cardiac care.
news.summary: In Kolkata, India on December 3, 2024, Manipal Hospitals, a prominent healthcare network in India, made a significant advancement in cardiac care by revealing the successful implantation of an AI-powered, wireless injectable pacemaker. This innovative pacemaker, known as the Aveir Leadless pacemaker created by Abbott, marks a pivotal moment in the field of cardiology.

news.headline: TRX reaches $20B peak, indicating potential altseason for December. HBAR surged 763% last month in crypto market.
news.summary: Certain digital currencies are showing early indications of an altseason, with Hedera's HBAR notably surging by 763% over the last month.

news.headline: Peraton wins $249M task order for LSOV rockets for Naval Warfare; contract spans 60 months.
news.summary: Peraton, based in Reston, Va., has secured a significant contract worth $249 million to supply Long-Range Sub Orbital Vehicles (LSOV) to the Naval Surface Warfare Center Port Hueneme Division. The contract spans 60 months, with Peraton serving as the main contractor. This agreement encompasses the design, development, manufacturing, assembly, integration, and testing of different multi-stage, long-range sub-orbital rocket setups. Additionally, it includes associated ground test hardware, specialized test equipment, and more.

news.headline: 2025 Financial calendar released for Nykredit Group companies with important dates and numbers.
ServiceTitan launches IPO roadshow for 8.8M shares of Class A common stock, filing with SEC.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based company ServiceTitan, Inc. has commenced the roadshow for its upcoming initial public offering of its Class A common stock. The software platform for trades disclosed that it filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the US Securities and Exchange Commission to offer 8,800,000 shares of its Class A common stock to the public. ServiceTitan also plans to provide the underwriters with an option to purchase additional shares.

news.headline: Scotiabank's 2024 results include a net income of $7,892 million, compared to $7,450 million in 2023. For the fourth quarter, net income was $1,689 million, compared to $1,354 million. Adjusted net income for the year was $8,627 million, vs. $8,363 million. Adjusted net income for Q4 was $2,119 million, compared to $1,643 million. The Bank's CET1 ratio was 13.1%. Operating results and financial highlights across various business segments showed steady growth & positive performance.
news.summary: Scotiabank's 2024 fiscal year saw a net income of $7.9 billion, with an earnings per share of $5.87 and a return on equity of 10.2%. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the bank reported a net income of $1.69 billion, with an earnings per share of $1.22 and a return on equity of 8.3%. Adjusted net income for the fiscal year was $8.63 billion, with adjusted earnings per share of $6.47 and a return on equity of 11.3%. In the fourth quarter, adjusted net income was $2.12 billion, with adjusted earnings per share of $1.57 and a return on equity of 10.6%. The bank maintained a Common Equity Tier 1 capital ratio of 13.1% and strong liquidity metrics. Across its business segments, Canadian Banking reported adjusted earnings of $4.28 billion, International Banking reported adjusted earnings of $2.86 billion, Global Wealth Management reported adjusted earnings of $1.61 billion, and Global Banking and Markets reported earnings of $1.69 billion. Overall, the bank's strategic progress was noted as positive, with a focus on client primacy initiatives for enhanced profitability.

news.headline: AltaGas announces 2025 guidance: $1,775M-$1,875M EBITDA, $2.10-$2.30 EPS; $1.4B capital program; 6% | increase in dividend to $1.26 per share. CEO emphasizes growth opportunities in Utilities and Midstream sectors. Priorities include de-risking platform and de-leveraging journey.
news.summary: AltaGas Ltd. announces its 2025 guidance and outlook, including normalized EBITDA guidance of $1,775 million - $1,875 million, a six percent increase in common share dividend to $1.26, and a capital program of $1.4 billion for 2025. The company aims for a four percent year-over-year growth in normalized EPS to $2.10 - $2.30. 54-58% of normalized EBITDA is expected from Utilities, driven by customer additions and rate base growth. Midstream segment (42-46% of EBITDA) anticipates growth from global export volumes and higher facility utilization. The company focuses on de-risking and de-leveraging, aiming to reach 4.0x net debt to normalized EBITDA. The CEO emphasizes opportunities in AI, datacenter demand for natural gas, and LNG projects benefiting their growth outlook. Divestiture of 10% interest in MVP is anticipated in Q2 2025. Rate base growth is expected to be below 8% in 2025 due to Midstream capital investments, with an increase in growth rates from 2026. Monetization of MVP, cash flows from projects like Pipestone II and REEF, and de-risking initiatives are planned for de-leveraging. Overall, AltaGas aims for sustainable growth and shareholder value enhancement in 2025 through strategic execution.

news.headline: Rover's 12th Annual Report shows surge in pet names like Bluey, Taylor Swift, Brunson, Provolone. Entertainment trends.
news.summary: Rover's latest annual report, the 12th of its kind, showcases a significant rise in pet owners naming their pets Bluey, Taylor Swift, Brunson, and Provolone. The report, unveiled in Seattle on December 3, 2024, by Rover.com, a leading platform for pet services, highlights a trend where individuals are drawing inspiration from entertainment, sports, and even grocery items when naming their pets. This indicates a shift in naming conventions among pet owners, with notable numbers reflecting this change.

news.headline: Fangzhou Inc. (06086.HK), a leader in Internet healthcare, shares included in Hang Seng Hong Kong-Listed Biotech Index.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Fangzhou Inc., a prominent provider of Internet healthcare solutions, revealed that its Ordinary Shares (06086.HK) will be added to the Hang Seng Index on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited. This announcement signifies a significant milestone for the Company and highlights its position as a leader in the industry. The inclusion of Fangzhou's shares in the index reflects the company's strong performance and market presence, further solidifying its standing among investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Baijiayun awarded "Best Digital & Intelligent Learning Tool Provider" title, driving AI+ education. ($ RTC)
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Baijiayun Group Ltd, a leading AI video solution provider listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RTC, was recognized as the "Best Digital and Intelligent Learning Tool Service Provider." The award was received during an event held from November 20 to 21 that focused on the integration of AI technology with various industries.

news.headline: 5th Symposium on Global Maritime Cooperation and Ocean Governance held in Sanya, China on Nov. 26, 2024. Organized by Huayang Center for Maritime Cooperation and Ocean Governance.
news.summary: In Sanya, China, the 5th Symposium on Global Maritime Cooperation and Ocean Governance took place on November 26, 2024. The event occurred in Hainan Province and was co-organized by the Huayang Center for Maritime Cooperation and Ocean Governance and the National Institute for South.

news.headline: Freedom West Homes reaches $30M funding milestone with 2.0 model featured in Parity Zone Symposium.
news.summary: The Freedom West 2.0 model was highlighted at the debut Parity Zone Symposium in San Francisco on December 3, 2024. Freedom West Homes Corporation, a non-profit limited-equity housing co-operative based in the Fillmore District of San Francisco, revealed the conclusion of a significant venture.

news.headline: LightInTheBox will report Q3 2024 financial results on Dec 10, 2024, with earnings call at 8:00 a.m. ET. NYSE: LITB
news.summary: LightInTheBox Holding Co., Ltd. will hold an earnings call at 8:00 a.m. ET on December 10, 2024. Based in Singapore, the global fashion brand and e-commerce service provider, LightInTheBox, (NYSE: LITB), disclosed this information on December 3, 2024. The Company is set to unveil its financial results and other updates during the call.

news.headline: Nonprofit GMO/Toxin Free USA launches website promoting seed companies not selling GMO seeds, supporting independent values.
news.summary: In New Fairfield, Connecticut on December 3, 2024, a new resource has been introduced for non-GMO and organic gardeners and farmers. This tool is designed to assist them in steering clear of genetically modified seeds and to back independent seed companies aligning with their principles. The nonprofit organization GMO/Toxin Free USA (GTFU) unveiled this tool, which aims to support the values of these agricultural practitioners.

news.headline: John & Daria Barry Foundation funds Veterans Consortium's Women Veterans Legal Assistance Program, a three-year grant for vetsprobono.org.
news.summary: In an update from Washington on December 3, 2024, The Veterans Consortium has revealed ongoing success with a three-year grant from the John and Daria Barry Foundation. This grant is dedicated to supporting the Women Veterans Legal Assistance Program, which stands as the sole national program specializing in this area. The grant has empowered the program to serve a significant number of women veterans in need of legal aid. The community applauds this initiative as it continues to make an impact on the lives of veterans.

news.headline: PAM Health acquires Southern Indiana Rehabilitation Hospital on Dec. 3, 2024, renaming it PAM Health Rehabilitation Hospital.
news.summary: In Enola, Pennsylvania on December 3, 2024, PAM Health, a prominent healthcare company, has successfully completed the acquisition of Southern Indiana Rehabilitation Hospital. The transition is officially in effect as of December 3, 2024, with the hospital rebranded as PAM Health Rehabilitation Hospital of Greater Indiana North.

news.headline: Support Toys for Tots on Giving TOYSday to bring joy to children in need. Marine Toys for Tots Program encourages generosity.
news.summary: In Triangle, Virginia, on December 3, 2024, the Marine Toys for Tots Program is urging people across America to embody the season of giving by participating in Giving Tuesday, also dubbed "Giving TOYSday." Their goal is to spread joy by providing toys to children in need.

news.headline: VestGen Wealth Partners launched with 10 advisory practices & $5.3B assets under management, solving advisor succession challenges.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Josh Gerry, a veteran in the wealth management sector, made a significant announcement regarding the launch of VestGen Wealth Partners (VestGen) in Chicago. This novel firm is committed to addressing the succession issues encountered by financial advisors. This move marks a milestone in the industry and signifies a shift towards innovative solutions for wealth management.

news.headline: US Agra joins Acannability as a founding member in pioneering novel cannabinoid standards in hemp-derived industry.
news.summary: US Agra, a prominent I.P. Holding and Supply Chain Management Company in the hemp-derived cannabinoid sector, has recently disclosed its collaboration with Acannability, an organization focused on setting industry standards. This partnership aims to innovate and establish new benchmarks within the realm of novel cannabinoids. This news was unveiled in Chicago on December 3, 2024. US Agra's participation in Acannability signifies a significant step forward in the industry, where both entities anticipate driving advancements.

news.headline: "The RIG 1938 breaks two Guinness World Records™ titles: tallest waterslide at 76.309 meters and most waterslides from a single tower – 12 slides in Lusail, Qatar."
news.summary: Qetaifan Projects, a subsidiary of Katara Hospitality, proudly revealed that in Lusail, Qatar, "The RIG 1938" has secured two Guinness World Records™. The waterslide stands at an impressive 76.309 meters, making it the tallest of its kind. Additionally, the structure boasts a remarkable 12 slides originating from a single tower, setting a new record for the most waterslides from a single tower.

news.headline: Pinecone launches knowledge platform for AI applications, promises 48% accuracy boost. Named AWS GenAI Innovator Partner.
news.summary: Pinecone has been acknowledged as the AWS GenAI Innovator Partner of the Year for its cutting-edge vector database technology and exclusive AI models, enabling developers to create AI applications with up to 48% increased accuracy. This recognition was announced in Las Vegas on December 3, 2024. By leveraging Pinecone's solutions, developers can speed up the development process and enhance the precision of their AI projects significantly.

news.headline: Experts urge flu vaccination for all 6 months and older to reduce severe illness and hospitalization risk, during National Influenza Vaccination Week.
news.summary: Experts are advising individuals aged 6 months and above to receive the influenza vaccine during National Influenza Vaccination Week to lower the chances of severe illness and hospitalization. This recommendation comes from various locations including Arlington, Virginia, Bethesda, Maryland, Chicago, and Dallas. As of December 3, 2024, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention stress the importance of this practice to combat the flu season effectively.

news.headline: China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi: China has no intention to challenge or replace the US.
4M Building Solutions acquires Covenant Building Service with the help of O2 Investment Partners in St. Louis.
news.summary: A recent announcement from O2 Investment Partners reveals that 4M Building Solutions has successfully acquired Covenant Building Service. This acquisition signifies a significant move in the industry, consolidating the expertise and resources of the two companies. This development is expected to have a notable impact on the market, with both companies bringing valuable experience and capabilities to the table. The completion of this deal underscores the continued growth and strategic expansion within the sector.

news.headline: EU earmarks €4.6 bln for net-zero technologies and EV battery cells.
Push Security introduces new feature to detect verified stolen credentials, reducing false positives and enhancing threat intelligence for security teams.
news.summary: A new feature has been launched by Push Security in London to address the issue of high false positive rates in threat intelligence data. The feature aims to assist security teams in reducing the noise by providing more accurate information. This development comes as a solution to the increasing challenges faced by security teams in handling the overwhelming amount of data. By implementing this feature, teams can improve their efficiency and focus on relevant threats.

news.headline: Cybersecurity threats to rise from AI-savvy teens & employees. Experian forecasts for 2025 predict growing risks. Data breaches surpass 2023.
news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California, Experian's 12th annual Data Breach Industry Forecast foresees unexpected challenges from cybercriminals and various threat vectors. The report predicts five trends for 2025, emphasizing the increasing role of AI. These include new threats from AI-proficient teenagers and heightened risks for AI hubs being targeted by hackers. Global data breaches are escalating, surpassing the 2023 numbers as this year progresses, indicating a persistent threat landscape.

news.headline: Cyware launches Healthcare Threat Intelligence Platform (HC-TIP) to protect healthcare organizations from cyber threats.
news.summary: A new Healthcare Threat Intelligence Platform (HC-TIP) developed by Cyware is aiding in the prompt response to cyberattacks in the healthcare sector. The platform, known as HC-TIP, is designed to safeguard continuity, protected health information (PHI), device connectivity, and other crucial aspects of healthcare operations. This innovative platform, named HC-TIP, produced by Cyware is playing a significant role in enhancing cybersecurity measures within the healthcare industry.

news.headline: BlackRock to acquire HPS Investment Partners for $12 billion in BlackRock equity, totaling $148 billion in client assets.
news.summary: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) and HPS Investment Partners have finalized a deal in which BlackRock will purchase HPS for around $12 billion. HPS, a prominent credit investment manager, currently oversees approximately $148 billion in client assets. The agreement involves BlackRock acquiring HPS with all payment conducted in BlackRock equity. The equity will be in the form of SubCo Units, issued by a BlackRock subsidiary, and can be exchanged at a one-to-one rate for BlackRock common stock. This acquisition marks a significant move in the finance industry.

news.headline: Joby receives FAA approval for Part 141 Flight Academy for pilot training. Important numbers: NYSE: JOBY, Part 5 SMS system.
news.summary: A company in Santa Cruz, California, known as Joby Aviation, Inc., which is listed on the NYSE as JOBY, has recently obtained a Part 141 certificate from the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for its flight academy. Additionally, the FAA has accepted its air operations voluntary Safety Management System (SMS) established under Part 5. This certification allows the Joby Aviation Academy to provide efficient pilot training. It's a significant step in developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service.

news.headline: Stocks of U.S. Steel drop as Trump pledges to halt acquisition by Nippon Steel.
